default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to review SEO performance and content updates for Ramp's various page types.](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog pages show positive click trends, but not matching impression growth; refreshes recommended](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Expense category pages faced significant decline (-1000 clicks) due to competitive in-depth reviews](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Vendor pages integration progressing well: 42 articles updated, 9 new pages ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Email campaign tool vendor pages in progress; pricing display for Klaviyo to be adjusted](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

## Topics

### Blog Page Performance

  - [Click trend improving over past 4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Not keeping pace with impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Refreshes recommended 2-3 weeks ago to address this gap](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

### Per DM Pages

  - [Slight decline (-45 clicks), potentially seasonal](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [No major position changes](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Competitive SERP landscape with GCA government page leading](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Outranking some local government websites](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Swapping positions with competitors like Track Work](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

### Expense Category Pages

  - [Largest decline (-1000 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [37 software pages losing positions intensively](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [Competitor in-depth review pages dominating searches](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Ramp's programmatic, shorter content struggling to compete](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Ranking low (2nd-3rd pages) for review-type queries](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)

### Tuning Pages

  - [Slight decline; 2 pages lost positions](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [10 featured snippets total (positive indicator)](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Average performance higher than pre-refresh](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [One article regained lost snippets, recorded highest clicks (11) in Week 15](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### Treasury PSCO Pages

  - [Apparent decline not alarming](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Position improvements from Week 12 to 15 for all 3 articles](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Impressions falling; possible stabilization after seasonal growth](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

### Vendor Pages

  - [Early stage; slight click growth, improving impressions](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [42 articles updated with Victoria's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [9 new vendor pages ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [4 email campaign tool pages in progress](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Klaviyo pricing display to be adjusted for consistency within category](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue monitoring blog page performance post-refresh](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [Observe Per DM page click trends for seasonal patterns](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Review and potentially revise strategy for expense category pages to compete with in-depth reviews](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Victoria to review new batch of vendor pages, particularly email campaign tools](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Adjust Klaviyo pricing display in vendor page to align with category standards](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Await next steps for blog refresh lists from Ali](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Deliver best bank articles next week](https://fathom.video/share/oq9sCuVY6sghz_LybZEV25BBoBVuGhxJ?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
